verilog_source:
// node_relu_3 - INT8 elementwise ReLU, flat-bus, 32 channels, 256-bit packed.
// pipeline_latency_cycles = 1.

module node_relu_3 (
    input  wire                clk,
    input  wire                rst_n,
    input  wire                valid_in,
    output reg                 ready_in,
    input  wire [255:0]        data_in,
    output reg                 valid_out,
    output reg  [255:0]        data_out
);

    localparam integer OC = 32;

    integer i;

    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if (!rst_n) begin
            valid_out <= 1'b0;        // [INVARIANT:VALID_OUT_LATENCY]
            ready_in  <= 1'b1;        // [INVARIANT:READY_IN_GATING]
            data_out  <= 256'b0;
        end else begin
            ready_in  <= 1'b1;        // [INVARIANT:READY_IN_GATING]
            valid_out <= valid_in;    // [INVARIANT:VALID_OUT_LATENCY]
            if (valid_in) begin
                for (i = 0; i < OC; i = i + 1) begin
                    data_out[i*8 +: 8] <= ($signed(data_in[i*8 +: 8]) > 0)
                                            ? data_in[i*8 +: 8]
                                            : 8'sd0;
                end
            end
        end
    end

endmodule
